name: Nouryon
description: Nouryon produces 98% sulfuric acid, a crucial inorganic acid used in various applications. Their commitment to sustainability and innovative partnerships underlines the importance of their chemical products in everyday life.

name: Shijiazhuang Xinlongwei Chemical Co.Ltd
description: Shijiazhuang Xinlongwei Chemical Co., Ltd. is a leading manufacturer and exporter of sulfuric acid, among other hazardous chemicals, in North China. Their focus on liquid hazardous chemicals highlights their expertise in this area.

name: Suez Company For Fertilizers Production SCFP
description: SCFP is a manufacturer that produces sulfuric acid along with various agricultural fertilizers, highlighting its expertise in this area.

name: Nyrstar
description: Nyrstar is a prominent manufacturer of sulfuric acid, highlighting its significance as a vital commodity with various applications. The company provides detailed technical data and safety information related to its sulfuric acid products.

name: Life Supplies NV
description: Life SUPPLIES is a market leader in additives for the animal feed sector, offering a wide range of products, including organic acids.

name: Mersen SA
description: Mersen specializes in advanced materials and corrosion-resistant equipment, which are crucial for high-tech industries. They offer a pre-assembled HCl Sintaclor® system specifically designed for hydrochloric acid production.

name: Brainerd Chemical Co., Inc.
description: Brainerd emphasizes its commitment to safety and high standards in the chemical industry, highlighting its extensive experience in packaging various industrial chemicals, including sulfuric acid. Sulfuric acid is noted as a strong, inorganic acid widely used as a pH adjuster and is among the top products in the market.

name: Clariant Chemicals
description: Clariant offers ActiSorb® S 3, a highly effective zinc oxide-based adsorbent specifically designed for the removal of sulfur components like hydrogen sulfide and mercaptans from hydrocarbon feed streams. This product addresses key industry needs related to sulfur management.

name: Hydrite Chemical
description: Hydrite specializes in sulfur chemistries, highlighting its expertise and commitment to technical and dependable chemical solutions.

name: thyssenkrupp Industrial Solutions
description: thyssenkrupp Industrial Solutions specializes in the engineering and construction of industrial plants, including efficient, low-emission sulfuric acid plants. Their expertise in tailored, turnkey solutions ensures reliability and sustainability for projects in the chemical sector.
